description: Fallback questions needing AI agent reclassification

questions.description: Find coefficients of x⁴ and x⁵ in (1-2x)⁵; then find p such that (1+px)(1-2x)⁵ has no x⁵ term.
Given differential equation and point, find exact equation of curve by integration.
Show surface area formula for cylinder with fixed volume, then find r minimizing surface area.
Express volume of water in inverted pyramid in terms of h; then find rate water level rises when height is 10 cm, given constant inflow rate.
Functions f and g defined for x ≥ 0; parts ask to show gf(x), find (fg)^-1(x), and solve gf(2x)=fg(x).
Calculate predicted bamboo height after 60 days using linear (Model A) and exponential (Model B) growth models based on initial measurements.
Define functions f and g, find their ranges, explain why gf cannot be formed, and solve inequality involving f' and f^{-1}.
Find values of q for which vectors u and v are perpendicular; then find angle between them when q=0.
Find the volume generated by rotating the shaded region under y=x²+1 from y=1 to y=5 about the y-axis.
Find equations of circles C1 and C2, show line RS has equation y=-2x+13, then show x-coordinates of intersection points satisfy 5x²-60x+159=0.
Find values of constant k for which line and curve intersect at two distinct points.
Find the term independent of x in the expansions of (a) and (b), each worth 3 marks.
Solve f(x)=0 for x in form a+b√c; then find m,n such that f(x)=g(h(x))
Find volume generated by rotating shaded region under curve x=12/y²-2 between y=1 and y=2 about y-axis, in terms of π.
Show total area A in terms of x, then find dimensions for maximum area given 480m fencing.
In right triangle ABC, find AM in terms of x, then show θ equals π/6 minus arctan(1/(2√3)).
Water tank loses increasing amounts daily; calculate loss on day 30 and when tank empties, then find remaining percentage after 30 days with 10% daily increase.
Given differential equation and point on curve, find constant k and then the curve's equation.
Find common difference of AP and common ratio of GP given their first three terms are equal.
Find x-values where dx/dt = half of dy/dt, given point P moves on curve with constant dy/dt.
Find p such that AB = CB, then for p=1, use scalar product to find angle ABC.
Sketch graph of y=2cosx, find length PQ, then show h=5π/9 and find k.
Find coordinates of intersection points of two cubic curves y = x³ - 1 and y = x³ + 1.
Find angle ABC in radians and area of shaded region formed by two intersecting circles with given radii and perpendicular line.
Find dy/dt when x=1, given point moves along y=2x+5/x with dx/dt=0.02 units/sec.
Find equations of lines AC and OB, then calculate coordinates of point B using kite symmetry about AC.
Calculate area of shaded region in terms of r and θ; then find perimeter when r=3 and θ=1.2.
Calculate salt amount in 12th week and total over first 12 weeks with 2% weekly increase from 8000kg start.
Express vectors DA and CA in terms of i, j, k; then use scalar product to find angle CAD in 3D geometry.
Show vector OE in component form and find angle BDO using scalar product in 3D geometry with given pyramid dimensions.
Given trapezium ABCD with coordinates and geometric constraints, find h then use it to find D's coordinates.
Express vectors AM and GM in terms of i, j, k; then find angle GMA using scalar product.
Find min/max y-values for curve and line, sketch both graphs, state number of solutions for given equation over [0, 2π].
Part (a) asks to show common difference of AP is a/3, then find 'a' given T10-T4=36. Part (b) finds fifth term of GP with S∞=9S4 and first term 12.
Given points A(1,3), B(9,-1), find midpoint D, then derive and solve equations for point C(x,y) such that CD²=20 and AC=BC.
Given functions f and g, find constants a and b using given conditions, then express gf(x) as cx+d.
A spherical balloon is inflated at a constant volume rate; find its radius after 30 seconds and the rate of radius increase at that time.
Question asks to state ranges of f and g, sketch g(x), and describe transformations mapping f(x) to h(x).
Find the set of m values for which line y=mx+1 and parabola y=3x²+2x+4 intersect at two distinct points.
For each part (a), (b), (c), state the equation of the broken-line graph in terms of f(x), given the solid-line graph of y=f(x).
Expand (1+a)^5 up to a^3, then use it to expand [1+(x+x^2)]^5 up to x^3.
Point P moves along curve y=(5x−1)^(1/2) with dx/dt=2; find dy/dt at x=1 and x when dy/dt=5/8.
Show that b=3a and find area of shaded region between curve and line OA as ka⁴.
Given sums of first 20 and 40 terms of an AP, find the 60th term.
Question asks to show angle PCS is 2π/3 radians, find exact perimeter, and show area of plate is (20π/3 + 8√3) cm².
Given f(x) = 2x² + 3 for x ≥ 0, find and simplify ff(x), then solve ff(x) = 34x² + 19.
Find the volume generated by rotating the shaded region bounded by y²=x−2, x=5, and y=1 about the x-axis.
Given seven cylindrical pipes radius 20cm arranged hexagonally, find angle PAQ, rope length, hexagon area, and total enclosed region area.
Given f(x) = (1/3)(2x-1)² - 2x for x ∈ (1/2, a), find max a such that f is decreasing.
Solve fg(x) = 3 and find expression for (fg)^(-1)(x) given piecewise functions f and g.
Find coefficients a and b in expansions, then solve for k given a+b=216.
Find exact area of triangle BCD given theta = pi/6, and exact perimeter given BD = sqrt(3)/2 * r.
Find intersection points A and B of curve y=(3x-2)^(1/2) and line y=(1/2)x+1, then compute enclosed area.
Find positive constant a such that coeff of x⁴ in (3+x)⁵ equals coeff of x² in (2x+a/x)⁶.
Find the value of k and point of tangency between line y=kx−k and curve y=−1/(2x).
For curve y=2+3sin(½x) over [0,4π], find max/min y, sketch curve, and count solutions of equation.
Water fills a tank at constant rate; find dh/dt when h=10, then find V when dh/dt=0.075 cm/s.
Solve the polynomial equation 8x⁶ + 215x³ - 27 = 0 for real values of x.
Find the set of possible values of constant c such that f(x) > 2 for all real x, given f(x) = x² - 6x + c.
Find exact solutions of the quartic equation 3x⁴ - 12x² - 15 = 0, using prior context.
Show θ=0.7297 rad, then find perimeter and area of shape ABCD to 3 significant figures.
Expand (2 + ax)^3 and find the positive constant a.
要求描述一个组合变换序列，明确说明变换应用的顺序。
Find coordinates of points A and B, then calculate area between given curve and line.
Calculate EF length and area of symmetrical plate with given radius and angles; then find r when perimeter is 6 cm.
Find coordinates of point A and area of shaded region between two intersecting curves.
Given a line in intercept form intersecting axes at A and B, with midpoint on another line and AB=10, find values of a and b.
Given f(x) = x³ - 3x² - 9x + 2 for x > n, find the least integer n such that f is increasing.
Given points A, B, C with B as midpoint of AC, find coordinates of C in terms of m,n, then find m and n using perpendicular condition and line passing through C.
Verify right angles at DAB, DAC, CAB using vectors; then find area of triangle ABC and volume of pyramid ABCD.
Find the largest possible value of constant 'a' such that f is increasing for x < a, given f(x) = x³ - x² - 8x + 5.
Find area and volumes of revolution for shaded region under curve y=1/2(x⁴−1) from x=0 to x=1 about x- and y-axes.
Calculate stamp value in 2015 after annual 5% growth from $10,000 in 2005; find AP first term and common difference from given sum formula.
Given an AP with first term -12 and common difference 6, find the least n such that sum exceeds 3000.
Find values of a for which hyperbola and line intersect at two distinct points.
Find the largest value of constant k such that f(x) = (2x-1)² - 6x is decreasing for x in (1/2, k).
Calculate angle ABP, areas of sectors BAP and DAQ, and the shaded region in rectangle ABCD with given dimensions and arcs.
Find x-coordinates of intersection points A and B of two given functions, then calculate area of shaded region between them.
Find values of constant b for which line y=x+1 meets curve y=x²+bx+5.
Find k using point A(2,2), verify intersection at x=5, then calculate shaded area between curve and line.
Find the area of the shaded region in triangle OAB with given arcs and dimensions.
Express length PQ in terms of t; then find its maximum value as t varies.
Solve fg(x) = 1 and sketch graph of y = f(x) for x in [0, 2π].
Determine if f(x) = x³ + 2x² - 4x + 7 for x ≥ -2 is increasing, decreasing, or neither, showing all working.
Given f'(x) and that f is increasing for x > n, find the least integer n.
Runner increases daily distance by 10% over 21 days, ending at 20 km; find initial distance and total over 21 days.
Find the equation of a line through midpoint M of (3,7) and (-1,1), parallel to x/3 + y/2 = 1.
Given differential equation and two points on curve, find the exact equation of the curve.
Show volume formula for cone with slant height 15 cm, then find h for stationary volume and determine its nature.
Vectors PB and PQ to be expressed in i,j,k; determine if P is nearer to Q or B; find angle BPQ using scalar product.
Calculate angle CAO in radians and area of shaded region using r, π, √3.
Show surface area S and volume V of cuboid are related by S=7V^(2/3); then find dV/dt when V=1000 and dS/dt=2.
Find k values where line and curve meet at two distinct points; then show tangents for two k-values meet on x-axis.
Find values of m for which line y=mx−3 and curve y=2x²+5 do not intersect.
Find the rate of increase of radius of a spherical balloon when volume increases at 50 cm³/s and radius is 10 cm.
Show that the line y=6x+4 intersects the curve y=2x²+m(2x+1) at two distinct points for all m.
Given sum formula of AP, find smallest k such that kth term > 200.
Given f'(x) and point (4,7), find dy/dt when x=4 with dx/dt=0.12; then find equation of curve.
Find area of shaded region in terms of r and θ, then perimeter when r=10, θ=0.6.
Find a/b given that coefficients of x, x², x⁴ in (a+bx)⁷ form a GP.
Find value of 'a' given sum equality between GP and AP, then find k where AP term is zero.
Find positive integers a, b, c from graph; then use graph to find number of solutions for two equations in [0, 2π].
Calculate perimeter and area of metal plate ABC with given arcs and straight side, in terms of π and √3.
Given f(x) = (x+3)/(x-1) for x>1, find ff(5) and an expression for f⁻¹(x).
Given volume model V = 3/2(r-0.5)³ - 1 and dV/dt = 1.5 m³/s, find dr/dt at r=5.5m and V when dr/dt=0.1m/s.
Describe the two transformations applied to y = f(x) to obtain y = 3 - f(x), in correct order.
Show angle XYC is 0.9582 radians; then find perimeter of ABC using given radii and geometry.
Solve the rational equation 3x + 2 = 1/(x - 1) for x, excluding undefined values.
Find the area between two curves intersecting at (0,1) and (4,5), then find the acute angle between their tangents at (4,5).
Find perimeter, area difference of triangles, and total area of aircraft cross-section RASB using given radii and angles.
Find rate of depth increase in cm/min when water depth is 4m, given volume-depth relation and constant inflow rate.
Find perimeter and area of shaded lens-shaped region formed by two intersecting circles of radius r, centers distance 5r/3 apart.
Expand (1+3x)^6 up to x² term; then find x² coefficient in product with (1-7x+x²).
Determine for which values of constant c the line and curve intersect, given their equations.
Find the rate of increase of volume V of a cube with edge length x increasing at 0.01 cm/min when x=20.
Find equations of transformed curves y=x² under sequences of reflection and translation, then state mapping between them.
Question asks for value of k in angle ACB = kπ, perimeter of shaded motif, and area of shaded region in terms of π, r, and √3.
Find coordinates of intersection points A and B using substitution u=2x-3, then calculate exact area of shaded region between curves.
Find coordinates of intersection points A and B of two curves, then calculate area of shaded region between them.
Show that the given logarithmic equation can be written as a quadratic in x, then solve it to 3 significant figures.
State the set of values of x for which the expansion in part (a) is valid.
Solve absolute value equation 2|x-1|=3|x|, then use result to solve 2|5^x-1|=3|5^x| to 3 significant figures.
Show graph of y vs x is straight line via logs; find x-coordinate of intersection with y=2x.
Show that line through A and B does not intersect given line l, and find perpendicular distance from A to l.
Solve the equation 3|2^x - 1| = 2^x, giving answers correct to 3 significant figures.
Solve cot θ + cot(θ + 45°) = 2 for θ in (0°, 180°), showing all working.
Find integer b where curve y=x⁴−2x³−7x−6 intersects x-axis at (b,0), then derive and solve equation for a.
Find values of a and b such that p(x) is divisible by (2x-1) and leaves remainder 5 when divided by (x+2).
Sketch locus of z satisfying |z+3-2i|=2, then find minimum |z| for points on this locus.
Show line l does not intersect line through A and B; find foot of perpendicular from A to l.
Find quotient and remainder when dividing 2x⁴ - 27 by x² + x + 3.
Find least value of |z - w| for points on locus defined by |w - 3 + 2i| = |w + 3 - 4i|.
Show graph of y vs x is straight line; then state its equation as y=px+q given a=b³.
Show x+7 is a factor of f(x), find quotient when divided by x+7, then solve trig equation using result.
A cuboid container with square base x and height 10−x has volume decreasing at rate proportional to 1/t. Show dx/dt equation, then solve for y in terms of x.
Find the quotient and remainder when x⁴ is divided by x² + 2x - 1.
Find the quotient and remainder when x⁴ is divided by x² + 2x - 1.
Find value of 'a' and intersection point for two intersecting lines; then find two possible 'a' values given angle between directions.
Solve the equation 4|5^x - 1| = 5^x, giving answers correct to 3 decimal places.
Find constants a and b such that (a+bx)√(1+4x) has x coefficient 3 and x² coefficient -6 when expanded.
Show that lines l and m are perpendicular, intersect, and find the perpendicular distance from origin to line m.
Express 4cosx−sinx as Rcos(x+α), find R and α, then solve 4cos2x−sin2x=3 for x in (0°, 180°).
Find value of c given angle between lines l and m is 60°; then show perpendicular length from point to line l is √11.
Find set of x values satisfying |2^(x+1) - 2| < 0.5, to 3 significant figures.
